[00:00:02] THE REPORTER: Good morning. My name is Wes Harold, and I am the reporter assigned to this mock deposition.
[00:00:18] MS SELIGMAN: Counsel may begin.
[00:00:20] MS SELIGMAN: Good morning, Ms. Jacob. My name is Jerry Sellingman. We represent Moonlight Plaza Association in this matter.
[00:00:30] WITNESS: Yes.
